bug.description: incorrect protocol state machine transition that violates 3GPP specification

prompt:
There is a incorrect protocol state machine transition that violates 3GPP specification downstream of function resize_nr_list in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/gNB_scheduler_primitives.c:2356.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
